overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player exits a concrete underpass into an open downtown area with towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards, then proceeds along a wet street beneath an elevated highway while observing the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete pedestrian underpass with geometric walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered underpass following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored clothing walking ahead in the underpass

entered.detail: smooth concrete ceiling of the covered walkway
sloped concrete wall with geometric angular design
vertical concrete wall with vertical ridge patterns
yellow textured guidance strip running down the center of the walkway floor
fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered concrete underpass. The environment is dimly lit with artificial lighting, featuring geometric concrete walls and a yellow tactile paving strip guiding the path. A single pedestrian walks ahead in the distance as the camera moves steadily forward toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between underpass exit and open city street

events.description: exits the covered underpass into the open urban environment with visible skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking out of the underpass into the open street area with increasing visibility of the cityscape and neon lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking along the right side near the parking structure

entered.detail: multi-level concrete parking structure with horizontal line patterns
tall modern street light with horizontal LED fixture
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows and neon accents visible in the distance
wet asphalt road with moving vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the underpass into an open urban area, revealing a futuristic cityscape with a multi-level parking garage on the right and neon-lit skyscrapers in the distance. The ground is wet and reflective, and the lighting shifts from artificial to mixed natural and neon. A few pedestrians are visible as the scene opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with panoramic view of downtown skyscrapers and elevated transit tracks

events.description: camera turns left to pan across the city skyline and elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: standing and turning to observe the expansive cityscape, looking up at towering buildings and holographic billboards

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway or monorail tracks spanning horizontally across the view
large digital billboard displaying animated neon advertisements on building facade
dense cluster of tall glass skyscrapers with extensive neon lighting and illuminated windows
large angled concrete pillar supporting the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to reveal a breathtaking panoramic view of the cyberpunk cityscape. Massive elevated highway tracks dominate the upper frame, supported by large concrete pillars, while neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic billboards illuminate the night sky. The scene emphasizes the vertical scale and density of the futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk beneath elevated highway with commercial billboards and passing traffic

events.description: camera turns back to forward facing direction and resumes walking along the street
yellow sports car and other vehicles pass by on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing illuminated billboards and observing the street traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a purple umbrella walking on the opposite side of the street

entered.detail: dark building exterior with multiple illuminated billboards and neon signage
large digital screen displaying animated neon graphics and advertisements
row of commercial shopfronts with colorful illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back to face forward and continues walking along the city sidewalk beneath the elevated highway. The street is lined with commercial buildings featuring bright digital billboards and neon shopfronts. Vehicles pass by on the wet road, and the elevated structure creates a sheltered canopy overhead while the camera moves through the cyberpunk streetscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the confines of a dim concrete underpass into the sprawling, neon-lit expanse of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving steadily through a dimly lit tunnel with geometric walls and yellow tactile paving, following a distant pedestrian toward the exit. As the camera emerges from the underpass, the environment opens into a wide urban area where the lighting shifts to a mix of neon and natural tones reflecting off wet pavement beside a multi-level parking garage. The view then expands as the camera turns left to reveal a panoramic cityscape dominated by massive elevated highway tracks and towering holographic billboards that emphasize the vertical scale of the city. Finally, the camera turns back forward to proceed along a sheltered sidewalk beneath the highway, passing bright digital shopfronts and flowing traffic in the dense cyberpunk streetscape.
